acceptance_criteria: Projects dashboard page (/projects) renders with project list
New Project button and modal/form works
content.layer2_validation_notes: PASSED - Database schema fix successful. Application no longer shows infinite loading. Projects dashboard renders, New Project form accessible, responsive design working at all 3 viewports. Screenshots captured at scheduler/validation/screenshots/clawd-sp2/. Secondary unit test failures exist (rate limiting, NextAuth context) but core functionality verified working.
